datasets.name: kpi_claims
queryLines:
WITH claims AS (
  SELECT * FROM healthcare.bronze.claims
), high_cost AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS high_cost_claims FROM healthcare.analytics.high_cost_claims_summary
), providers AS (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT provider_id) AS provider_count FROM healthcare.bronze.providers
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_claims,
  COUNT(DISTINCT provider_id) AS active_providers,
  ROUND(SUM(CAST(billed_amount AS DOUBLE)), 2) AS total_billed_amount,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(billed_amount AS DOUBLE)), 2) AS avg_billed_amount,
  ROUND(MAX(CAST(billed_amount AS DOUBLE)), 2) AS max_billed_amount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN procedure_code IS NULL OR TRIM(CAST(procedure_code AS STRING)) = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_procedure_claims,
  SUM(CASE WHEN billed_amount IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_billed_amount_claims,
  (SELECT high_cost_claims FROM high_cost) AS high_cost_claims,
  ROUND(100.0 * (SELECT high_cost_claims FROM high_cost) / COUNT(*), 2) AS high_cost_claim_pct,
  (SELECT provider_count FROM providers) AS registered_providers
FROM claims

datasets.name: daily_claim_trend
datasets.displayName: Daily Claims, Cost, and Risk Trend
queryLines:
SELECT
  claim_date,
  total_claims,
  active_provider_count,
  total_billed_amount,
  avg_billed_amount,
  high_cost_claim_count,
  ROUND(100.0 * high_cost_claim_count / NULLIF(total_claims, 0), 2) AS high_cost_claim_pct,
  ROUND(total_billed_amount / NULLIF(active_provider_count, 0), 2) AS billed_amount_per_active_provider
FROM healthcare.analytics.week2_dashboard_summary
ORDER BY claim_date

datasets.name: profile_checks
queryLines:
WITH claims AS (
  SELECT * FROM healthcare.bronze.claims
), providers AS (
  SELECT * FROM healthcare.bronze.providers
), claim_stats AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS total_claims,
    COUNT(DISTINCT claim_id) AS distinct_claims,
    SUM(CASE WHEN procedure_code IS NULL OR TRIM(CAST(procedure_code AS STRING)) = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_procedure,
    SUM(CASE WHEN billed_amount IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_billed,
    MAX(CAST(billed_amount AS DOUBLE)) AS max_billed,
    AVG(CAST(billed_amount AS DOUBLE)) AS avg_billed
  FROM claims
), orphaned_providers AS (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.provider_id) AS orphan_provider_ids
  FROM claims c
  LEFT ANTI JOIN providers p ON c.provider_id = p.provider_id
), provider_stats AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS total_providers,
    SUM(CASE WHEN location IS NULL OR TRIM(CAST(location AS STRING)) = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_location
  FROM providers
)
SELECT 'Q1' AS check_id, 'claim_id uniqueness' AS check_name, total_claims - distinct_claims AS issue_count, CASE WHEN total_claims = distinct_claims THEN 'PASS' ELSE 'FAIL' END AS status, CONCAT(CAST(distinct_claims AS STRING), ' distinct claim IDs across ', CAST(total_claims AS STRING), ' rows') AS detail FROM claim_stats
UNION ALL SELECT 'Q2', 'missing procedure_code', missing_procedure, CASE WHEN missing_procedure = 0 THEN 'PASS' ELSE 'WARN' END, CONCAT(CAST(ROUND(100.0 * missing_procedure / NULLIF(total_claims, 0), 2) AS STRING), '% of claims missing procedure_code') FROM claim_stats
UNION ALL SELECT 'Q3', 'missing billed_amount', missing_billed, CASE WHEN missing_billed = 0 THEN 'PASS' ELSE 'WARN' END, CONCAT(CAST(ROUND(100.0 * missing_billed / NULLIF(total_claims, 0), 2) AS STRING), '% of claims missing billed_amount') FROM claim_stats
UNION ALL SELECT 'Q4', 'provider referential integrity', orphan_provider_ids, CASE WHEN orphan_provider_ids = 0 THEN 'PASS' ELSE 'FAIL' END, CONCAT(CAST(orphan_provider_ids AS STRING), ' provider IDs in claims do not exist in providers') FROM orphaned_providers
UNION ALL SELECT 'Q5', 'max billed amount vs average', CASE WHEN max_billed / NULLIF(avg_billed, 0) > 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, CASE WHEN max_billed / NULLIF(avg_billed, 0) > 10 THEN 'WARN' ELSE 'PASS' END, CONCAT('max=', CAST(ROUND(max_billed, 2) AS STRING), ', avg=', CAST(ROUND(avg_billed, 2) AS STRING), ', max/avg=', CAST(ROUND(max_billed / NULLIF(avg_billed, 0), 2) AS STRING)) FROM claim_stats
UNION ALL SELECT 'Q6', 'providers missing location', missing_location, CASE WHEN missing_location = 0 THEN 'PASS' ELSE 'WARN' END, CONCAT(CAST(ROUND(100.0 * missing_location / NULLIF(total_providers, 0), 2) AS STRING), '% of providers missing location') FROM provider_stats
ORDER BY check_id

datasets.name: quality_issue_counts
queryLines:
WITH claims AS (
  SELECT * FROM healthcare.bronze.claims
), providers AS (
  SELECT * FROM healthcare.bronze.providers
)
SELECT 'missing procedure_code' AS check_name, SUM(CASE WHEN procedure_code IS NULL OR TRIM(CAST(procedure_code AS STRING)) = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS issue_count, 'WARN' AS status FROM claims
UNION ALL SELECT 'missing billed_amount', SUM(CASE WHEN billed_amount IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 'WARN' FROM claims
UNION ALL SELECT 'providers missing location', SUM(CASE WHEN location IS NULL OR TRIM(CAST(location AS STRING)) = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 'WARN' FROM providers
UNION ALL SELECT 'orphan provider IDs', COUNT(DISTINCT c.provider_id), 'FAIL' FROM claims c LEFT ANTI JOIN providers p ON c.provider_id = p.provider_id
ORDER BY issue_count DESC, check_name

datasets.name: specialty_performance
queryLines:
WITH high_cost AS (
  SELECT specialty, COUNT(*) AS high_cost_claims, SUM(billed_amount) AS high_cost_billed_amount
  FROM healthcare.analytics.high_cost_claims_summary
  GROUP BY specialty
)
SELECT
  s.specialty,
  s.claim_count,
  s.provider_count,
  ROUND(s.avg_billed_amount, 2) AS avg_billed_amount,
  ROUND(s.total_billed_amount, 2) AS total_billed_amount,
  COALESCE(h.high_cost_claims, 0) AS high_cost_claims,
  ROUND(100.0 * COALESCE(h.high_cost_claims, 0) / NULLIF(s.claim_count, 0), 2) AS high_cost_claim_pct,
  ROUND(s.total_billed_amount / NULLIF(s.provider_count, 0), 2) AS billed_amount_per_provider
FROM healthcare.analytics.claims_by_specialty_summary s
LEFT JOIN high_cost h ON s.specialty = h.specialty
ORDER BY high_cost_claim_pct DESC, total_billed_amount DESC, specialty ASC

datasets.name: region_performance
queryLines:
WITH high_cost AS (
  SELECT region, COUNT(*) AS high_cost_claims, SUM(billed_amount) AS high_cost_billed_amount
  FROM healthcare.analytics.high_cost_claims_summary
  GROUP BY region
)
SELECT
  r.region,
  r.claim_count,
  r.provider_count,
  ROUND(r.avg_billed_amount, 2) AS avg_billed_amount,
  ROUND(r.total_billed_amount, 2) AS total_billed_amount,
  COALESCE(h.high_cost_claims, 0) AS high_cost_claims,
  ROUND(100.0 * COALESCE(h.high_cost_claims, 0) / NULLIF(r.claim_count, 0), 2) AS high_cost_claim_pct,
  ROUND(r.total_billed_amount / NULLIF(r.provider_count, 0), 2) AS billed_amount_per_provider
FROM healthcare.analytics.claims_by_region_summary r
LEFT JOIN high_cost h ON r.region = h.region
ORDER BY high_cost_claim_pct DESC, total_billed_amount DESC, region ASC

datasets.name: diagnosis_mix
queryLines:
SELECT
  category,
  severity,
  COUNT(*) AS claim_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT diagnosis_code) AS diagnosis_code_count,
  ROUND(SUM(CAST(billed_amount AS DOUBLE)), 2) AS total_billed_amount,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(billed_amount AS DOUBLE)), 2) AS avg_billed_amount,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 2) AS claim_mix_pct
FROM healthcare.analytics.claims_diagnosis_joined
GROUP BY category, severity
ORDER BY claim_count DESC, category ASC, severity ASC

datasets.name: procedure_benchmark
queryLines:
WITH benchmarked AS (
  SELECT
    c.procedure_code,
    p.location AS region,
    CAST(c.billed_amount AS DOUBLE) AS billed_amount,
    CAST(cost.expected_cost AS DOUBLE) AS expected_cost
  FROM healthcare.bronze.claims c
  LEFT JOIN healthcare.bronze.providers p ON c.provider_id = p.provider_id
  LEFT JOIN healthcare.bronze.cost cost ON c.procedure_code = cost.procedure_code AND p.location = cost.region
  WHERE c.procedure_code IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(CAST(c.procedure_code AS STRING)) <> '' AND cost.expected_cost IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  procedure_code,
  region,
  COUNT(*) AS claim_count,
  ROUND(AVG(billed_amount), 2) AS avg_billed_amount,
  ROUND(AVG(expected_cost), 2) AS avg_expected_cost,
  ROUND(AVG(billed_amount / NULLIF(expected_cost, 0)), 2) AS avg_benchmark_ratio,
  SUM(CASE WHEN billed_amount / NULLIF(expected_cost, 0) >= 1.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_cost_claims,
  ROUND(SUM(billed_amount - expected_cost), 2) AS total_variance_to_expected
FROM benchmarked
GROUP BY procedure_code, region
ORDER BY avg_benchmark_ratio DESC, claim_count DESC

datasets.name: provider_leaderboard
queryLines:
WITH high_cost AS (
  SELECT provider_id, COUNT(*) AS high_cost_claims, AVG(amount_to_benchmark_ratio) AS avg_high_cost_ratio
  FROM healthcare.analytics.high_cost_claims_summary
  GROUP BY provider_id
)
SELECT
  j.provider_id,
  j.doctor_name,
  j.specialty,
  j.location AS region,
  COUNT(*) AS claim_count,
  ROUND(SUM(CAST(j.billed_amount AS DOUBLE)), 2) AS total_billed_amount,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(j.billed_amount AS DOUBLE)), 2) AS avg_billed_amount,
  COALESCE(h.high_cost_claims, 0) AS high_cost_claims,
  ROUND(100.0 * COALESCE(h.high_cost_claims, 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS high_cost_claim_pct,
  ROUND(COALESCE(h.avg_high_cost_ratio, 0), 2) AS avg_high_cost_ratio
FROM healthcare.analytics.claims_provider_joined j
LEFT JOIN high_cost h ON j.provider_id = h.provider_id
GROUP BY j.provider_id, j.doctor_name, j.specialty, j.location, h.high_cost_claims, h.avg_high_cost_ratio
ORDER BY high_cost_claims DESC, total_billed_amount DESC, claim_count DESC
LIMIT 50

datasets.name: high_cost_claims
queryLines:
SELECT
  claim_id,
  provider_id,
  doctor_name,
  specialty,
  region,
  procedure_code,
  ROUND(billed_amount, 2) AS billed_amount,
  ROUND(expected_cost, 2) AS expected_cost,
  ROUND(amount_to_benchmark_ratio, 2) AS amount_to_benchmark_ratio,
  CASE
    WHEN amount_to_benchmark_ratio >= 2.5 THEN 'Critical'
    WHEN amount_to_benchmark_ratio >= 2.0 THEN 'High'
    ELSE 'Watch'
  END AS risk_tier
FROM healthcare.analytics.high_cost_claims_summary
ORDER BY amount_to_benchmark_ratio DESC, billed_amount DESC, claim_id ASC

datasets.name: risk_tiers
queryLines:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN amount_to_benchmark_ratio >= 2.5 THEN 'Critical: >=2.5x benchmark'
    WHEN amount_to_benchmark_ratio >= 2.0 THEN 'High: 2.0x-2.49x benchmark'
    ELSE 'Watch: 1.5x-1.99x benchmark'
  END AS risk_tier,
  COUNT(*) AS claim_count,
  ROUND(SUM(billed_amount), 2) AS total_billed_amount,
  ROUND(AVG(amount_to_benchmark_ratio), 2) AS avg_benchmark_ratio
FROM healthcare.analytics.high_cost_claims_summary
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY avg_benchmark_ratio DESC

datasets.name: claims_by_diagnosis
queryLines:
SELECT
  diagnosis_code,
  category,
  severity,
  COUNT(*) AS claim_count,
  ROUND(SUM(CAST(billed_amount AS DOUBLE)), 2) AS total_billed_amount,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(billed_amount AS DOUBLE)), 2) AS avg_billed_amount
FROM healthcare.analytics.claims_diagnosis_joined
GROUP BY diagnosis_code, category, severity
ORDER BY claim_count DESC, total_billed_amount DESC, diagnosis_code ASC

datasets.name: exploration_sample
queryLines:
SELECT
  p.claim_id,
  p.provider_id,
  p.doctor_name,
  p.specialty,
  p.location AS region,
  d.category AS diagnosis_category,
  d.severity AS diagnosis_severity,
  p.procedure_code,
  p.billed_amount,
  p.date AS claim_date
FROM healthcare.analytics.claims_provider_joined p
LEFT JOIN healthcare.analytics.claims_diagnosis_joined d ON p.claim_id = d.claim_id
ORDER BY p.date DESC, p.claim_id ASC
LIMIT 100

datasets.name: ops_update_summary
queryLines:
SELECT
  update_state,
  COUNT(*) AS update_count,
  MAX(timestamp) AS latest_timestamp,
  COUNT(DISTINCT pipeline_id) AS pipeline_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT actor) AS actor_count
FROM healthcare.analytics.ops_pipeline_updates
GROUP BY update_state
ORDER BY update_count DESC, update_state ASC

datasets.name: ops_pipeline_updates
queryLines:
SELECT
  timestamp,
  update_id,
  pipeline_id,
  update_state,
  actor
FROM healthcare.analytics.ops_pipeline_updates
ORDER BY timestamp DESC

datasets.name: ops_expectation_rollup
queryLines:
SELECT
  dataset,
  expectation,
  COUNT(*) AS metric_events,
  SUM(passed_records) AS passed_records,
  SUM(failed_records) AS failed_records,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(failed_records) / NULLIF(SUM(passed_records) + SUM(failed_records), 0), 2) AS failed_record_pct,
  MAX(timestamp) AS latest_timestamp
FROM healthcare.analytics.ops_expectation_metrics
GROUP BY dataset, expectation
ORDER BY failed_record_pct DESC, failed_records DESC, dataset ASC, expectation ASC

datasets.name: ops_expectation_metrics
queryLines:
SELECT
  timestamp,
  update_id,
  dataset,
  expectation,
  passed_records,
  failed_records
FROM healthcare.analytics.ops_expectation_metrics
ORDER BY timestamp DESC

datasets.name: ops_latest_failures
queryLines:
SELECT
  timestamp,
  dataset,
  update_id,
  platform_error_code,
  diagnostic_id,
  error_message
FROM healthcare.analytics.ops_latest_failures
ORDER BY timestamp DESC

datasets.name: ops_user_actions
queryLines:
SELECT
  timestamp,
  update_id,
  pipeline_id,
  actor,
  action_name
FROM healthcare.analytics.ops_user_actions
ORDER BY timestamp DESC

lines: Volume, cost, provider activity, and high-cost risk across the Week 2 healthcare claims data.
LVDash version of the six required profiling questions from the Streamlit and notebook workflow.
Benchmarked high-cost claims, risk tiers, procedure variance, and provider-level concentration.
Diagnosis category, severity, specialty, region, and claim sample views for exploratory analysis.
DLT update state, expectation metrics, user actions, and latest failure diagnostics.
